description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a rich blue fabric, featuring a left-facing chaise lounge. The sofa has a minimalist design with clean lines, a low profile, and gently curved armrests that wrap around the ends. The seat and back cushions are uniform, rectangular, and appear to be firmly attached, providing a streamlined look. The sofa is supported by slender, metal legs with a slight outward angle, giving it a light and airy appearance. The upholstery is a solid color with a subtle woven texture, and the overall construction suggests comfort and durability. This piece would be suitable for contemporary urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or modern living spaces.
description: A modern L-shaped blue sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, clean lines, and slim metal legs. The design is minimalist with uniform cushions and gently curved armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, left-facing chaise, and all seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the curved armrest on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the extension of the main seating area.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform, rectangular seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all firmly attached and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests present on both ends, rising slightly above the seat level with a smooth, continuous profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, outward-angled metal legs with a minimalist, exposed design, positioned at the corners for support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached rectangular cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and style.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture, no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
